title: A Lean 4 formalization of a SimpleDNF switching lemma with CNF-dual and explicit layer-schedule infrastructure
description:
(v0.10.0) GA-3 matching extension encode infrastructure (S2187/S2188). S2187 adds feed-parametric components: vertex-query canonical matching DTs, walk traces/blocks/sigma surfaces, star-code graded bounds, counterexample-disposal pins, and path-answer transport. S2188 adds deterministic encodeMatch assembly: leftmost live depth-preserving feed selection, exact tree-trace synchronization, and packaged graded encode components (G1/G2/G3) for square hole-injective base matchings. This is deterministic trace/encode bookkeeping only.

Prior releases retain Gate B coefficient-lane and frozen-form stack S2175-S2183, Gate A realized-code/row-collision obstruction and no-go packaging through S2140, Gate B syntactic-terminal class envelopes through S2172, SimpleDNF switching lemma infrastructure, CNF-dual and bounded-depth bridges, PHP depth-floor rungs, and generated/refined iterated-collapse certificates. Concept DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20757627.

Non-claims: this release does not claim encode injectivity, a bad-set cardinality bound, a PHP switching lemma (Gate A rung 4 remains open), Frege/PHP lower bounds, NP/circuit lower bounds, arbitrary AC0 or bounded-depth collapse, full frozen-payload B4 beyond the named class, or any P-vs-NP statement.
